core_model.structure_summary: A one-step birth-death master equation for a probability distribution over a nonnegative integer count, with polynomial transition rates built from falling-factorial products of the state.

variables.meaning: probability distribution over integer states evolving in time
transition rate constants and integer stoichiometric coefficients of the elementary steps

deterministic_skeleton.summary: A scalar first-order ordinary differential equation with competing power-law source and sink terms plus a linear decay, yielding logistic-type saturation of the mean.

notes: Core is the chemical/birth-death master equation (probability flow); the generating-function PDE and moment hierarchy are derived tools. Skeleton is the mean-field rate equation d(rho)/dt = (lambda a / b!) rho^b - (mu d / c!) rho^c - gamma rho, the Verhulst logistic ODE for the special-case exponents.
